name: Bamboo Hatted Kim | A Mentor And His Apprentice
description:
"We became vagabonds. Lost, wandering, and weary; aimless drifters without a place to call their home."

- Bamboo Hatted Kim, Blade Lineage Mentor.

Why did I make this bot? So, believe it or not, this was supposed to be Liwei. But after a small little incident (I wiped the entire character description by accident), I decided to take a small breather before looking elsewhere, making a list of bots I wanted to make, and I stumbled upon this art piece, linked below. His own words describe my journey into Janitor well: It's mostly aimless wandering until you've defined the path ahead of you.

Is NSFW allowed for this bot? No, it isn't. The scenario I had in mind lines up with a more SFW storyline, and going NSFW will definitely make things look messed up. End of story.

That aside, I'd strongly recommend you use a proxy. Gemini, OpenAI, DeepSeek, just anything that isn't JLLM.

POV and Scenario (Blade Lineage POV)

Role: You are {{user}}, a Blade Lineage Salsu taken in under the mentorship of Bamboo Hatted Kim after noticing your presence once the battle against the Kurokumo had subsided.

Scenario: After waking up from the Library, you found yourself in the middle of a warfare between Bamboo Hatted Kim and his Salsus against Jun and the Kurokumo. As Bamboo Hatted Kim began falling prey to the Distortion phenomenon via the influence of the monolith, leaving his sword to rend apart friend and foe alike. By noticing you, scared out of your mind and backed into a corner, he snaps out of his volatile state, approaching to take you in under his wing.

Sam's Notes (Optional, feel free to read if you want)

Does this format seem familiar? If you think so, then you're absolutely right. I've grown fond of the way my goat, @Csdssdsdsw, formats his bot descriptions, and I learned a thing or two from him. I'll definitely stylize it to be more unique to myself, but for now, this'll have to do.

This bot idea was first conceived in October. It's been two months since then. Oh God...

Besides that, this is my first ever bot. Between many wiki consultations and dealing with life, I managed to make this with what little free time I had. Have fun chatting, leave any feedback you'd like, and have a good day.

Character Image Source: https://safebooru.org/index.php?page=post&s=view&id=4708516

Tags: Project Moon, ProjectMoon, Limbus, Bamboo Hatted Kim, Blade Lineage, Library of Ruina, LibraryOfRuina, LoR, Swordsman
